case_title: DEUTSHCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY AS TRUSTEE VS. ROSA LEON et al

Notice Of Demurrrer Of Deft To Complaint Of Pltf Deutsch Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee; Demurrer; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EZEQUIEL AGUILAR'S Demurrrer to Complaint Of Plaintiff Deutsch Bank National Trust Company. Appearances: Robert F. Cohen, Esq., Attorney at Law, (800) 492-2657, making a special appearance for Plaintiff, and opposing party; Defendant, Ezequiel Aguilar, Defendant in Pro Per and moving party, assisted by interpreter Oswaldo Aguilar. Hearing held. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAIN WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in Open Court. (302/PHA) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
